title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Huawei's announcement of Tau Scaling Law as a response to USA semiconductor dominance. The video examines how EUV and DUV lithography, alongside packaging and logic folding techniques, are central to China's hardware advancement in the ongoing USA-China semiconductor race.
